judgment.summary: Alibaba presents a low-valuation profile with strong analyst backing, though it is currently struggling with negative operating margins and significant free cash flow deficits.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was 0.62 vs an estimate of 5.74 (miss), with the next earnings date on 2026-05-13.
positives: Forward P/E 14.23 and PEG ratio 0.87 — suggests the stock is undervalued relative to growth.
Price/Sales (TTM) 0.31x — indicates a very low valuation relative to revenue.
Analyst consensus is a strong_buy with a mean target of $190.82.
Annual earnings growth of 100.5% shows significant recent expansion.
negatives: Last reported EPS of 0.62 missed estimates of 5.74 by 89.2%.
Free cash flow (TTM) is negative at -$46.51B.
Operating margin is slightly negative at -0.3%.
Analyst growth estimate for the current quarter is -31.1%.

news.paragraph: Alibaba recently reported Q4 earnings where revenues rose year-over-year, though profits missed estimates due to heavy AI spending. Despite this, several analysts have raised their price targets, with Nomura increasing its target to $207 and others highlighting 38% cloud growth. Traders should weigh the recent earnings results against these optimistic analyst revisions and the company's ongoing restructuring.
